assertionResults.title: Basic Curate Command Produces a Cut List

steps.action: Run curation with prompt 'find funny moments' after generating transcriptions
steps.expected: Exit code 0 and cut list JSON created
steps.observed: Exit code 1 with OpenRouter authentication failure; no cut list created

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by external dependency: OpenRouter API authentication failed (invalid/revoked API key).

assertionResults.title: Cut List Output Is Valid JSON With Required Fields

steps.action: Attempt to generate cut list via curate command
steps.expected: Valid cut list JSON available for schema/type validation
steps.observed: Curate failed before cut list creation due to authentication error

assertionResults.issues: No cut list artifact produced because curation is blocked by invalid OpenRouter credentials.

assertionResults.title: Segment Timestamps Are Valid and Within Source Boundaries

steps.action: Attempt to generate cut list then validate timestamps against transcriptions
steps.observed: Cannot run timestamp checks because curate failed and produced no segments

assertionResults.issues: Prerequisite cut list generation blocked by OpenRouter authentication failure.

assertionResults.title: Segment Source File References an Actual Transcribed Video

steps.action: Attempt to generate cut list then verify source_file references
steps.expected: Each segment source_file maps to an existing transcription
steps.observed: No cut list generated due to authentication failure

assertionResults.issues: Prerequisite cut list generation blocked by OpenRouter authentication failure.

assertionResults.title: Total Duration Equals Sum of Segment Durations

steps.action: Attempt to generate cut list then compare computed duration to total_duration
steps.expected: Computed sum matches cut list total_duration within tolerance
steps.observed: No cut list available because curate failed before output

assertionResults.issues: Prerequisite cut list generation blocked by OpenRouter authentication failure.

assertionResults.title: No Transcriptions Exist Produces Clear Error

steps.action: Run curate with prompt 'anything' against empty data directory
steps.expected: Non-zero exit, clear guidance to run transcribe first, and no cut list file
steps.observed: Exit code 1 with message: 'No transcriptions found. Run 'snipsnap transcribe <folder>' first...'; no cut list files present

blockers.description: OpenRouter authentication failure prevented all successful curate runs needed for VAL-CUR-001..005.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried curate with explicit --model; same invalid/revoked API key error persisted.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions: 1 passed (VAL-CUR-006), 5 blocked (VAL-CUR-001..005) due to invalid/revoked OpenRouter API key during curation.
